name: Friend's New Spellbook - TG TF / Transformation
description:
(CW: Transformation, Magical commands)
You always knew your friend was weird and perverted- but this is just messed up!
He's transformed you into a girl and cursed you to always follow his orders- and it seems he's not content to simply leave you as-is. He's got fantasies to fulfill...

(Update: Tweaked the personality a bit to improve narration.)
creator: Orbital_Lithium
